nasb.text: Now it came about after these things that the son of the woman, the mistress of the house, became sick; and his sickness was so severe that there was no breath left in him.

esv.text: After this the son of the woman, the mistress of the house, became ill. And his illness was so severe that there was no breath left in him.

cnv.text: 這些事以後，那婦人，就是那個家庭的女主人的兒子病了。他的病情十分嚴重，以致呼吸都停止了。

ccb.text: 后来，妇人的儿子病了，病情越来越重，最后死了。
